message:
Add hooks/buildEnvironment multi-byte truncation test

Cover the edge case where truncation loop completes but string still exceeds
1000 bytes due to a multi-byte character at the end. Uses 997 ASCII chars +
one 4-byte emoji to trigger the secondary truncation branch.

buildEnvironment: 96.3% → 100%
Overall hooks package: 44.3% → 44.6%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
